creator: orcaman42@gmail.com
text:
Staging for gnome2-2.32.1_7
gnome2-2.32.1_7 depends on file: /usr/local/libexec/gweather-applet-2 - not found
Verifying install for /usr/local/libexec/gweather-applet-2 in /usr/ports/x11/gnome-applets
gnome-applets-2.32.1.1_6 cannot install: Unknown component gnome panel.
Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/gnome-applets
Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/gnome
Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/gnome2

-------------------

Being completely new to FreeBSD I decided to attempt to fix it by...

cd /usr/ports/x11/gnome-applets
make install clean

My results:

gnome-applets-2.32.1.1_6 cannot install: Unknown component gnome panel.
Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/gnome-applets

Strike 1 :(

--------------------

To keep fighting the good fight I did this to try to fix it:

cd /usr/ports/x11/gnome-panel
make install clean

My results:

gnome-panel-2.32.1_7 cannot install: Unknown component evolutiondataserver.

Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/gnome-panel

--------------------

Am I missing something? Is this my fault? Can I help fix this? ( I have no idea how to code? ) To me this looks like it's missing something off the server? But I don't think I can add something to the server? Any help would be appreciated! :)

Chris
